caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain Expected with Moderate Winds in Caribbean Ports
caribbean.paragraph: Ocho Rios in the Western Caribbean is experiencing 11 kt winds with wave heights reaching 3.1 ft from the east and a 100% chance of rain, indicating persistent wet conditions. St. Maarten in the Eastern Caribbean faces slightly stronger winds up to 19 kt, but wave heights remain moderate, posing no marine warnings at this time.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Seas Impact Cadiz Port Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing moderate westerly winds at 19 knots with wave heights reaching 6.4 feet and a swell period of 11 seconds. Rain probability is high at 88 percent, indicating significant precipitation that will affect maritime operations and port activities.
